_comment: Label Studio project settings for all three RajNLP annotation projects. Requirements: 4.1, 4.2, 4.3, 4.4

rajnlp-sentiment.title: RajNLP-50K Sentiment Annotation
rajnlp-sentiment.description: 3-class sentiment labeling (positive / neutral / negative) for Rajasthani-Hindi code-switched sentences.
rajnlp-sentiment._overlap_comment: overlap=3 means all 3 annotators label every sentence (Requirement 5.1)
rajnlp-sentiment._blind_annotation_comment: show_annotation_history=false implements blind annotation mode — annotators cannot see each other's labels (Requirement 5.1)

rajnlp-ner.title: RajNLP-50K NER Annotation
rajnlp-ner.description: Span-level named entity recognition (PER / LOC / ORG) for Rajasthani-Hindi code-switched sentences.
rajnlp-ner._overlap_comment: overlap=3 means all 3 annotators label every sentence (Requirement 6.1)
rajnlp-ner._blind_annotation_comment: show_annotation_history=false implements blind annotation mode — annotators cannot see each other's labels (Requirement 6.1)

rajnlp-toxicity.title: RajNLP-50K Toxicity Annotation
rajnlp-toxicity.description: Multi-label toxicity detection (caste_slur / religious / gender / general) for Rajasthani-Hindi code-switched sentences.
rajnlp-toxicity._overlap_comment: overlap=3 means all 3 annotators label every sentence (Requirement 7.1)
rajnlp-toxicity._blind_annotation_comment: show_annotation_history=false implements blind annotation mode — annotators cannot see each other's labels (Requirement 7.1)

global_settings._note: These settings apply to all three projects.
global_settings._blind_annotation_mode_comment: Prevents annotators from seeing each other's labels before submitting their own (Requirements 5.1, 6.1, 7.1)
